name: soundseen-renderer
description: Server-side cinematic visualizer renderer for SoundSeen. Reads a CompositionSpec, drives a Three.js scene in headless Chrome at deterministic 60fps, pipes frames to FFmpeg.

scripts.build: tsc -p . && esbuild src/page/runtime.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/page/runtime.js && mkdir -p dist/page && cp src/page/host.html dist/page/host.html
